_comment: Verifier B (vision) decisions on flagged visual pairs. These are recorded judgments, NOT Builder claims. The rubric grader treats a flagged pair as resolved only if it appears here.

acceptedShots.about-mobile.png: Δheight is the responsive-image fix: the baseline image overflowed the viewport; constraining it to max-width:100% made it fit (and shorter). Allowed improvement, not a forbidden layout shift.
